title: GCP Cloud Monitoring alert policy
description: Normalized Cloud Monitoring alert policy snapshot, sourced from GET /v3/projects/{project}/alertPolicies plus firing incidents (delivered via Pub/Sub push subscription). One record per alert policy, keyed by policyId. Read-only.

policyId.description: Alert policy id (last path segment of the policy name).

displayName.description: Human-readable display name of the policy.

conditionsSummary.description: Short summary of the policy's conditions.

firing.description: Whether the alert currently has an open/firing incident.

lastIncidentTs.description: Timestamp of the most recent incident, if any.
